name: G-10 index generation: per-file metadata in INDEX.md surfaces rule count for operator review
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
  - id: g-ts-002
  - id: g-ts-003
recommended_set: [g-ts-001]
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-index "$PWD/INDEX.md" 2>err.txt; grep -qE 'rules.*3|3.*rules' INDEX.md && echo rule_count 1>&2
